entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/dashy

Category

Bugfix

Overview

Merges the claim names because gitlab puts them in groups_direct. applied this both on server-side auth check, and the cli…

  • The company (othor.ai) only accepts paid users (the free 20 requests/day has been su…
